pk_tuples.dose_original: 0.2 mg (2 mL of 0.1 mg/mL) clonidine HCl ER oral suspension, fasted
pk_tuples.notes: Study 2021-5094, Treatment B: Onyda XR 0.2 mg clonidine HCl ER oral suspension single dose under fasting conditions. Cmax 394.21 pg/mL = 0.394 ng/mL; AUCinf 11600.31 pg·h/mL = 11.60 ng·h/mL; AUCt 10207.48 pg·h/mL = 10.21 ng·h/mL.

pk_tuples.dose_original: 0.2 mg (2 mL of 0.1 mg/mL) clonidine HCl ER oral suspension, fed (high-fat meal)
pk_tuples.notes: Study 2021-5094, Treatment A: Onyda XR 0.2 mg clonidine HCl ER oral suspension after high-fat meal (900 Kcal). Cmax 386.50 pg/mL, AUCinf 11330.96 pg·h/mL, AUCt 10207.48 pg·h/mL.

pk_tuples.dose_original: 0.1 mg Kapvay clonidine ER tablets administered at 0 and 12 hours (total 0.2 mg)
pk_tuples.notes: Study 2021-5094, Treatment C (Reference LD): Kapvay 0.1 mg clonidine ER tablet at 0 and 12 hours under fasting. Cmax 413.03 pg/mL, AUCinf 12059.10 pg·h/mL, AUCt 10488.50 pg·h/mL.
